headline: Best Buy earnings preview: Wall Street expects sales boost from Apple MacBook Neo launch, bigger tax refunds
summary: This marks the first report since the company announced CEO Corie Barry is stepping down from the electronics retailer at the end of the third quarter.

headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From Best Buy Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
summary: Best Buy (BBY) to release Q1 earnings on May 28, with expected EPS of $1.23 and revenue of $8.83B. Analysts maintain Equal-Weight rating.
